text.title: pyproject.toml as the Single Source of Configuration Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to consolidate Python config into pyproject.toml end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-legacy
step.action: List every legacy config file (setup.cfg, .flake8, pytest.ini, tox.ini, mypy.ini, .coveragerc, requirements*.txt).
step.decision-gate: If exotic setup.py with imperative build steps is needed, STOP.

step.name: author-pyproject
step.action: Author pyproject.toml with `[build-system]`, `[project]`, and one `[tool.<name>]` table per tool.

step.name: migrate-config
step.action: Translate each legacy file into its `[tool.<name>]` table; remove the legacy file.

step.name: wire-ci-check
step.action: Add `bash check-no-legacy.sh` as a required CI step.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-pyproject-single-source.py --file pyproject.json` (after `python -c "import tomllib, json; print(json.dumps(tomllib.loads(open('pyproject.toml','rb').read())))" > pyproject.json`) to confirm tables + no legacy companions.
